demographic_profile.summary: Tech-savvy food and drink enthusiasts who actively use apps to discover, evaluate, and share dining experiences. They treat restaurant and bar exploration as both a personal passion and social activity, constantly comparing platforms and providing detailed feedback to improve recommendations. They are frustrated by generic suggestions and value personalized, community-driven insights that help them discover authentic local experiences and optimize their dining decisions.
